name: obsidian-timeline-for-bases
description: Adds a timeline (Gantt-like) view to Obsidian Bases.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json package-lock.json manifest.json versions.json
scripts.postversion: git tag -d v$npm_package_version 2>/dev/null; git tag $npm_package_version HEAD

author: TfTHacker
